candidates.why: This depreciation line appears in the SG&A/central administration section below net operating income, not as a cost-of-revenues/COGS line or as a sub-component explicitly tied to Cost of Revenues - Total.
This D&A line also appears in the SG&A area, not clearly tied to Cost of Revenues - Total. No explicit COGS-related D&A row is visible above the financial section.

variables.notes: No separate operating D&A row is clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket 'Cost of Revenues - Total'. Conservative choice is to treat COGS D&A as embedded unless explicitly shown outside that bucket.

candidates.why: This is an explicit operating depreciation row shown alongside SG&A-related lines (Central administration, Employee benefit expense, SG&A balancing value). Relative to the selected XSGA bucket rows, it appears to be a separate same-level line that should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in the selected rows.

This appears to be the analogous explicit SG&A-area D&A line for the year where 'Depreciation' is not populated. It should be included to capture separate SG&A-related D&A without double counting components.

variables.notes: The explicit D&A rows appear in the operating SG&A section and are not labelled as COGS-related. Since the selected XSGA bucket is built from other rows rather than an all-in SG&A total, these separate D&A lines should be added to XSGA later. Both labels are kept because they appear to populate different periods rather than representing simultaneous summary-plus-component duplication.
